## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration opportunities between Vijay's startup advisory firm m736.io and Marcel's growth marketing agency fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Vijay's firm m736.io helps seed/pre-seed startups (mostly from Europe/Israel) with go-to-market strategy, setting up websites, analytics, marketing campaigns, and initial sales pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Marcel's agency fwd.digital focuses on AI-powered content marketing, SEO, and automated outbound for growth-stage companies.](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [Both expressed interest in exploring referral partnerships and potentially bundling services for international startups entering the US market.](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [Marcel transitioned fwd.digital to full-time recently due to rapid growth, while still advising his previous company Deep Gram.](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)

## Topics

### Background on m736.io

  - [Helps seed/pre-seed startups (5-15 engineers) get set up for go-to-market](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Services include website, analytics, marketing campaigns, initial sales development](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Works with many European/Israeli startups entering US market](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Exploring rebranding from current "m736.io" name](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Potential to take equity stake in some client companies](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)

### Background on fwd.digital

  - [AI-powered content marketing and SEO services](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [Grew rapidly to $100K MRR in 3 months organically](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Clients include Ramp, Reddit, Fireworks, Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Offers $5K and $9K monthly packages](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Combines AI writing assistance with human editors/strategists](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Referral partnership with 10% revenue share](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Bundling services for international startups entering US](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Vijay providing fwd.digital accounts once startups reach Series B](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Exploring other areas to work together](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vijay to follow up with potential accounts for fwd.digital once they reach appropriate stage](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [Discuss bundling services for international startups trying to enter US market](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Keep exploring other collaboration opportunities as they arise](https://fathom.video/share/z7jZZxGL3v9gcpX6Yb4TT8fyz8NawCqz?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
